allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{p[\\"id\\"]}: {p[\\"potencia_pmax\\"]}Wp | {p[\\"ancho_mm\\"]}x{p[\\"alto_mm\\"]}mm | {p[\\"superficie_m2\\"]}m2'\) for p in data]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:b[k] for k in ['id','nombre','tension_nominal','capacidad_util_kwh','max_paralelo','tipo']}, ensure_ascii=False\)\) for b in data if b.get\('tension_nominal',0\)>=100 or b.get\('tipo'\)=='lifepo4_hv']")
